title: selliguea tenuicauda
intro: Selliguea tenuicauda, also known as the narrow-leaved seligiea or narrow-leaved polypody, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Selliguea tenuicauda include its potential to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusible in herbal remedies, with some practitioners also using it in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
